header.title: Welcome our new head of clinical operations

gold.name: Renata Okafor-Slate
claims: Renata Okafor-Slate joins Tallowfield Health on 1 September 2026 as head of clinical operations.
Renata Okafor-Slate spent six years at Meridian Care.
Renata Okafor-Slate oversaw the rollout of remote triage across 40 clinics at Meridian Care.
Renata Okafor-Slate will be based in Tallowfield Health's Manchester office.
Renata Okafor-Slate will lead Tallowfield Health's winter staffing review.
